title: GOOD: session UUID in ZIP-302 memo enables session recovery after app restart
description: Payment session UUID is stored in the 512-byte ZIP-302 shielded memo field (memo.rs). This means: even if the app loses local state, the payee can recover the session_id from the on-chain memo. The alternative (matching by amount alone) is ambiguous for equal-value payments. Memo content is a UUID (not a secret, not PII), compliant with ZIP-302 text memo format.
